question: Will DR Congo and Rwanda sign a ceasefire agreement by May 31, 2026?
reason: No credible reports indicate DR Congo and Rwanda will sign a ceasefire agreement by May 31, 2026.
evidence: The most recent peace agreement between DR Congo and Rwanda was signed on June 27, 2025, in Washington, D.C. ([ungeneva.org](https://www.ungeneva.org/en/news-media/news/2025/06/107953/guterres-welcomes-peace-deal-between-dr-congo-and-rwanda?utm_source=openai))

The fifth Joint Oversight Committee meeting on April 23, 2026, assessed the implementation of the existing peace agreement, with no indication of a new ceasefire agreement being planned. ([allafrica.com](https://allafrica.com/stories/202604240397.html?utm_source=openai))
